summary:
Hey name's AuthorVoid or just Void or just Author. You decide.
This little thing that will pop out of nowhere is collection of my old stories written from 2018-2022I decided to try and archive them as my futile attempt at new start. We gonna see how this will move on.If you are interested in more contend I will try to release something I been working on.
Disclaimer: All of One-Shots are set in Fgod Multiverse/Universe. (For those who don't know Force god of Destrctuion is alternative on original universe made by (harrish6) on Watpad..
I took deep inspiration and love for this take and admit got may or may not addicted.Well I do apologize if lot of stuff here will sound. Corny or dumb.
I wrote thist hough span of 4 years. Also grammar mistakes.I'm Czech on a Brittish or American. So just deal with it or idk go away.
I will try to fix my grammar as much as possible but if they are errors (heh) then don't be shocked.I wrote this for fun not to be someones slave back when I was still at school.
Well without further dellay Enjoy.
Also jesus having to read all the stuff makes me want to gag. God I will scrap like 70% for 200 one shots. I just know it.
